markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, access issues, and messaging updates.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Production:** All Dec content and the first week of Jan's are delivered. Vivek will submit more topics for approval by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [**GA4/GSC Access:** Access is blocked; users can only see the old `prophecy.io` domain. Cody has requested admin rights to resolve it.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Messaging Shift:** The focus is shifting from "data prep & analysis" to "AI data prep." Vivek will emphasize "workflows" in new content.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Team OOO:** Vivek & Etisham are OOO for the holidays. Vivek is also OOO Jan 12–16, but Etisham will be available.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Topics

### GA4/GSC Access Blocked

  - [**Problem:** Marketing team users can only see the old `prophecy.io` domain in GA4/GSC, not the new one.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Cause:** An IT access configuration error.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Cody has formally requested admin access to fix the issue directly.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Delivery:** All content for Dec and the first week of Jan is delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [**Approval:** Vivek will submit more topics for approval by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [**Review Status:** Cody is reviewing articles and will push them to staging over the next few days.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Note:** The Jan 1st week content is not urgent and can be reviewed after the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Content Quality & Messaging

  - [**Quality:** Overall quality is high; no major structural or positioning issues.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Terminology:** Use "agent" for Prophecy-specific features, not "co-pilot."](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Messaging Shift:** The core message is evolving to "AI data prep."](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prophecy is functionally the data prep part of the end-to-end analytics process.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [**Secondary Focus:** Continue reinforcing scalability and governance.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Process:** The content team is adapting quickly to messaging updates.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Strategy:** No plan to retroactively edit older guide content, as it serves primarily for keyword visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### Team Out-of-Office (OOO)

  - [**Vivek & Etisham:** OOO for the holidays (Christmas & last week of Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**Coverage:** Vivek will monitor Slack for urgent edits.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Vivek:** OOO Jan 12–16.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [**Coverage:** Etisham will be available.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Submit new topics for approval by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
      - [Emphasize "workflows" in new content.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Follow up in January on any further messaging changes.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [Push approved articles from review to staging over the next few days.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Secure admin access to GA4/GSC to resolve the access issue.](https://fathom.video/share/fMz9Tq9vpDpuzSMKaf8HygeX2WweLvbM?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
